final_prompt.prompt:
I need a cool design back and front for a business card for a photographer.
go with metallic and dark luxury styling. 
the back should cotains the logo of photography and it needs to look attractive
the front should contain also the logo of photography which you find on fancy business cards and under the logo there is Minyar Photography
also the icons for instagram : minyar.guediche.photography and facebook : Minyar-Photographer
also an icon for the phone number : 55 43 48 43
